subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath remembered his Lord and turned unto Him on a Day whereon the people of East and West have turned away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن ذکر مولیه و اقبل الیه فی یوم اعرض عنه اهل الشرق و الغرب الا
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
